difficulty.rationale: Requires modeling token families, atomic rotation that consumes the presented token, and reuse detection that revokes a whole family including its currently-valid token, plus HS256 access-token verification.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /login returns an access_token and refresh_token for valid credentials.
POST /refresh rotates the pair and consumes the presented refresh token.
Reusing a rotated-out refresh token returns 401 token_reuse_detected.
The access token from login authorizes GET /protected with sub alice.
must_not: Allow a consumed refresh token to be used again.
Keep a family usable after reuse is detected.
Issue an access token to wrong credentials.
edge_cases: An unknown refresh token returns 401 invalid_refresh.
After family revocation the currently-valid refresh token also returns 401.
An invalid or missing access token returns 401 from GET /protected.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
